rules.rule_text:
title: CloudflareD Tunnel Established
id: d7da7a43-4738-49d0-9702-4c74274dc380
description: CloudflareD establishes a reverse tunnel to CloudFlare that exposes one
  or multiple local network services to the internet, bypassing ingress firewall rules.
  Has been abused by threat actors as a C2 channel.
status: test
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: '2024-03-04'
modified: '2024-03-05'
references:
- https://www.guidepointsecurity.com/blog/tunnel-vision-cloudflared-abused-in-the-wild/
- https://blog.bushidotoken.net/2023/09/tracking-adversaries-akira-another.html
- https://www.cloudflare.com/ips-v4
- https://www.cloudflare.com/ips-v6
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1599
logsource:
  category: firewall
detection:
  selection:
    dest_port: 7844
    dest_ip|cidr:
    - 173.245.48.0/20
    - 103.21.244.0/22
    - 103.22.200.0/22
    - 103.31.4.0/22
    - 141.101.64.0/18
    - 108.162.192.0/18
    - 190.93.240.0/20
    - 188.114.96.0/20
    - 197.234.240.0/22
    - 198.41.128.0/17
    - 162.158.0.0/15
    - 104.16.0.0/13
    - 104.24.0.0/14
    - 172.64.0.0/13
    - 131.0.72.0/22
    - 2400:cb00::/32
    - 2606:4700::/32
    - 2803:f800::/32
    - 2405:b500::/32
    - 2405:8100::/32
    - 2a06:98c0::/29
    - 2c0f:f248::/32
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate use of cloudflared tunnels
level: high
